records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha. You are, no doubt, the Saintess. I didn't think we would get the results so quickly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha. You are, no doubt, the Saintess. I didn't think we would get the results so quickly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha. You are, no doubt, the Saintess. I didn't think we would get the results so quickly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here are the sacred garments, as promised.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here are the sacred garments, as promised.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here are the sacred garments, as promised.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am already excited for the rite.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am already excited for the rite.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am already excited for the rite.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. But where might the Savior be?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. But where might the Savior be?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. But where might the Savior be?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't see the others either. They should be back by now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't see the others either. They should be back by now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't see the others either. They should be back by now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... You could wait for them at the ritual area.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... You could wait for them at the ritual area.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... You could wait for them at the ritual area.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything else is ready, so we should be able to perform the rite as soon as the Savior arrives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything else is ready, so we should be able to perform the rite as soon as the Savior arrives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything else is ready, so we should be able to perform the rite as soon as the Savior arrives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My god, you look beautiful!
records.m_Talk_DEU: My god, you look beautiful!
records.m_Talk_FRA: My god, you look beautiful!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm jealous that the Savior gets to dance with such a beautiful Saintess!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm jealous that the Savior gets to dance with such a beautiful Saintess!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm jealous that the Savior gets to dance with such a beautiful Saintess!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Saintess? Are the garments not to your liking?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Saintess? Are the garments not to your liking?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Saintess? Are the garments not to your liking?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, there's just something bothering me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, there's just something bothering me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, there's just something bothering me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Savior... isn't one to break his promise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Savior... isn't one to break his promise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Savior... isn't one to break his promise.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did something happen to him...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did something happen to him...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did something happen to him...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: An earthquake?
records.m_Talk_DEU: An earthquake?
records.m_Talk_FRA: An earthquake?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah. It's nothing. This happens once in a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah. It's nothing. This happens once in a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah. It's nothing. This happens once in a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry, it'll become stable in no time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry, it'll become stable in no time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry, it'll become stable in no time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: H-huh? This feels worse than usual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: H-huh? This feels worse than usual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: H-huh? This feels worse than usual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's odd, it's never done this before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's odd, it's never done this before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's odd, it's never done this before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Monsters? Why are there monsters in the village?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Monsters? Why are there monsters in the village?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Monsters? Why are there monsters in the village?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What about the knights? Have they fallen to the monsters?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What about the knights? Have they fallen to the monsters?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What about the knights? Have they fallen to the monsters?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How rude. It is not possible that the knights would've lost to these pests.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How rude. It is not possible that the knights would've lost to these pests.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How rude. It is not possible that the knights would've lost to these pests.

records.m_Talk_ENG: However... It is clear that there is some kind of issue present.
records.m_Talk_DEU: However... It is clear that there is some kind of issue present.
records.m_Talk_FRA: However... It is clear that there is some kind of issue present.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You two should go get help from the other knights. I'll take care of things here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You two should go get help from the other knights. I'll take care of things here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You two should go get help from the other knights. I'll take care of things here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It's okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It's okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It's okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everything will be fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everything will be fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everything will be fine.
